HeroParagraph: Hello, I am a full-stack developer with a creative spark. I seek to bring novel experiences to life.
AboutMeParagraph:
Hello, I'm Tobias. I've been coding for 13 years, and I've been scribbling drawings since before I learned how to speak, so I happen to be pretty decent at that as well. Coding and drawing are similar in the sense that both bring something new into the world, and I seek to do it well across both fields, combining them when I can.

Below are some examples of my work and skillset in more detail.
Work-Antinomia-Teaser: Project Antinomia is an umbrella term that refers to my personal works in game development, writing, art and music (public and private alike) that share the same universe.
Work-Antinomia-Fulltext: This personal project is intended to merge my skills in various fields. In the beginning of 2026, I made Antinomia Star Chase, a small first person movement game, driven by my interest in responsive, fun, movement controls. I am gradually building out the framework for more media in the project. That means worldbuilding, stories, art, music, and of course, gameplay systems.
Work-EcoOnline-Teaser: At EcoOnline, I worked on maintenance and further development of the chemical safety datasheet software solution Almego.
Work-EcoOnline-Fulltext: Almego is a Chemical Safety Datasheet software solution that can help companies through the process of creating these important documents. This includes assistance in calculating the required hazard labels for the GHS/CLP regulations, based on the chemical contents of the product.
Work-Netcompany-Teaser: I started my career at Netcompany, working there for several years with a focus on Business Intelligence solutions and the Danish Vehicle Register.
Work-Netcompany-Fulltext:
I started at Netcompany, still being a student at DTU. Here I worked in a Business Intelligence focused team in their Application Services department. The work here was focused on the maintenance and ongoing development of several reporting solutions for different companies. Here I learned working with SSIS/SSAS based information flows, as well as integration of these into reporting software such as PowerBI and Excel. Pulling data from various sources and integrating it through these SSIS flows also helped sharpen my SQL skills.

Once I finished my studies, I took on a full time role, transitioning to a different team in the same department, who were responsible for the maintenance of the Danish Vehicle Register. Here my main contribution was on the integration to EUCARIS, a common EU information exchange initiative for different member nation's vehicle data.
Work-DTU-Teaser: I studied at DTU, learning solid technical skills and architectural principles.
Work-DTU-Fulltext: The Bachelor of Engineering at DTU in Software Technology provides a good coverage of the foundational skills that are needed to be able to create sound solutions in the real world. This includes both technical skills like object-oriented programming and database programming, as well as procedures like collaboration in version control software.
Antinomia-Music-Description: Wound Cleansing is the core of the project's musical identity. Take a listen!
Antinomia-Star-Description: Click on the icon to go to the Star Chase project page. Here you can download the game or go to the open source GitHub repository.
